page_content:
Total Credits

• Students must earn a "C-" or above in each course applied toward the certiﬁcate.

• Students must have a minimum 2.0 cumulative grade point average across all courses used to satisfy the undergraduate certiﬁcate requirements.

• No more than 9 credit hours applied towards a major may be counted for the certiﬁcate.

• No more than 9 credit hours may be taken at institutions other than UMD.

For more information, or to apply, please call the African American and Africana Studies Department at 301-405-1158. The AAAS ofﬁce is located in 1119 Taliaferro Hall.
